channel.title: João Blasques — Posts
channel.description: AI-Enabled Data Engineer with over 7 years of experience designing, building and optimizing data pipelines and machine-learning solutions.

item.title: Vitals: A Governed Medallion Lakehouse for Healthcare Data
item.description: A health-data lakehouse that turns messy FHIR, claims, wearable, and notes data into three trusted outputs — analytics marts, an ML feature store, and a vector index — with de-identification, OMOP standardization, and cross-engine parity testing that caught a real de-id gap.

item.title: Building a Self-Managing MBTA On-Time-Performance Lakehouse (Databricks + GCP)
item.description: A live transit-data lakehouse that ingests MBTA real-time feeds, computes on-time performance, and runs, heals, and improves itself — with an agentic layer that writes its own insights and opens pull requests.

item.title: Building a Customer Analytics Pipeline with Airflow, dbt and Spark
item.description: A production-grade ELT pipeline that automates daily identification of high-value customers using Apache Airflow, dbt-spark, and Apache Iceberg.

item.title: Analytics Engineering with dbt: From Raw Data to Business Intelligence
item.description: A comprehensive guide to implementing modern analytics engineering practices using dbt, BigQuery, and Looker Studio. Learn to build scalable data transformation pipelines with dimensional modeling, testing, and deployment strategies.

item.title: Building a Data Pipeline with BigQuery: From Storage to Analytics
item.description: A comprehensive guide to implementing a scalable, cost-effective data pipeline and warehouse using Google BigQuery, featuring external tables, partitioning, clustering, and performance optimization with NYC taxi data.

item.title: Orchestrating Data Pipelines with Apache Airflow: A Comprehensive Guide
item.description: A practical guide to building and orchestrating robust data pipelines using Apache Airflow, covering local, cloud (GCP), and Kubernetes deployments.

item.title: Simple Data Pipeline
item.description: A step by step guide of a simple data pipeline

item.title: The Role of AI in Modern Data Architectures
item.description: How artificial intelligence is transforming data systems and workflows

item.title: Machine Learning Pipeline Design
item.description: Best practices for creating efficient and scalable ML pipelines

item.title: Getting Started with Data Engineering
item.description: An introduction to the fundamentals of data engineering

item.title: Welcome to My Professional Website
item.description: Introduction and overview of what you can find on this site
